name: Annihilate Retroglight
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect on the field, except monsters that were Summoned this turn: Negate that activation, then you can banish (face-down) all face-up monsters your opponent controls, except monsters Summoned this turn. If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Set 1 Trap from your Deck.
